sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n94675" key="skelokopi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκελο-κοπία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κόπτω</etym>) <sense id="n94675.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fracture of a leg</tr_>, ib.</sense> </entryFree>
